summary_en: Self-tender offer price set at ¥3,401/share (10% discount to lower of 1-month VWAP ¥4,848 and May 20 closing price ¥3,779). Offer launches May 21, 2026. Acquisition cap and share count not disclosed. Partial cancellation of acquired shares under consideration.
title_en: Notice of Commencement of Self-Tender Offer for Own Shares
translation_en_brief: On May 11, 2026, JX Advanced Metals' board resolved to conduct a self-tender offer (公開買付け) for its own shares under the Companies Act. The offer price was determined using a formula: the lower of (a) the simple average closing price on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market for the one-month period to May 8, 2026 (¥4,848/share), and (b) the closing price on May 20, 2026 (¥3,779/share), discounted by 10%. Since May 20's closing price was lower at ¥3,779, the final offer price is ¥3,401/share. The self-tender commenced as scheduled on May 21, 2026. The company is also considering partial cancellation of any shares acquired through the offer. No acquisition cap amount or maximum share count is disclosed in this notice.
